title: AMD presents the Instinct MI455X accelerator with 432 GB of HBM4 and the Helios system to combat Nvidia in AI
summary: The company unveils its new CDNA 5 architecture and its partnership with Cerebras to offer high-speed, low-latency AI inference at scale.

title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Health for all adult users in the United States
summary: The new service offers personalized health advice, although the quality of responses could be lower in the free version according to independent analyses.

title: AMD reveals its EPYC roadmap with 256-core Zen 6 'Venice' and Zen 7 'Florence' for 2028
summary: Future server CPUs promise up to 1,152 MB of L3 cache and a performance increase of up to 80% compared to the previous generation.

title: AMD prepares the Ryzen 7 9800HX3D with 3D V-Cache for gaming laptops, possible presentation at CES 2027
summary: The new processor promises a significant performance leap in high-end gaming laptops.

title: Black Forest Labs presents Flux 3, its multimodal model capable of generating native video and audio up to 20 seconds
summary: The new version of generative AI takes a step forward by creating clips with synchronized sound, challenging other tools in the sector.

title: Google allows identity verification and account recovery through a selfie video from your mobile
summary: The new biometric authentication feature is offered as an alternative to traditional login methods.

title: Microsoft tests free Xbox Cloud Gaming with ads and one-hour sessions
summary: The cloud gaming service explores a freemium model to reach more users without requiring a paid subscription.

title: Microsoft demands that LG remove advertising pop-ups and bloatware from its Windows monitors
summary: The dispute between the two companies escalates as LG redirects its advertising strategy toward its smart TVs.

title: Anthropic updates Claude's voice mode with its most advanced AI models across all platforms
summary: The new voice mode is available for all users, improving the naturalness and capability of spoken interactions.

title: Microsoft launches compatibility with Xbox 360 and classic games on PC via an official emulator
summary: Windows users will be able to play old Xbox titles without the need for the original console.

title: They achieve 144 FPS in 4K by combining an RTX 3090 and an RTX 3050 with Lossless Scaling in recent games
summary: A non-conventional multi-GPU setup demonstrates that older Ampere GPUs can still deliver competitive 4K performance.

title: AMD launches Strix Halo APUs for robotics with Zen 5 cores and RDNA 3.5 graphics under the Ryzen AI Embedded brand
summary: The new processors compete with Intel Panther Lake and bring physical AI to embedded systems.

title: Sony will use analog sticks with TMR magnetic sensors on the PlayStation 6 controller to eliminate drift
summary: Magnetic detection technology promises to end the wear and drift of traditional analog joysticks.

title: Augmental Tech presents MouthPad Pro, a Bluetooth touchpad controlled with the tongue
summary: The innovative device allows controlling phones, tablets, and computers without using hands, focused on accessibility.

title: Primate Labs releases Geekbench 7 with realistic CPU, AI tests, and CUDA compatibility
summary: The new version of the popular benchmark includes multi-core tests and renewed multimedia workloads.

title: Codeberg prohibits repositories generated mostly by artificial intelligence after community vote
summary: The alternative platform to GitHub generates controversy and criticism from users who regret having migrated.

title: Serious security vulnerabilities found in OpenAI, Anthropic, and Kimi K3 AI agents
summary: The flaws in ChatGPT AgentForger, Claude Cowork, and Kimi K3 allowed remote code execution and virtual machine escape.

title: Meta launches a controversial optimistic advertising campaign about AI using a song about the end of the world
summary: The company promotes the benefits of artificial intelligence while the ad's soundtrack generates controversy.
